subject: 🚨 Best cities for jobs alert

body:
Peter,
Good news! We're winning the fight for jobs. We work every day for more jobs and higher pay.

We're taking Missouri in a new direction and earlier today, a list came out of the best cities in America for jobs: Missouri had 2 cities listed in the top 5 in the country! (https://www.usnews.com/news/best-states/articles/2017-09-12/these-are-the-10-best-cities-for-jobs-in-america?src=usn_tw&utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=6594700da7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_09_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-6594700da7-99411629)

We have a lot more work to do. Now though people are seeing--Missouri is back in the fight!

Yours in service,
Eric Greitens

name: The White House
subject: Working Together For The American People
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f5824a657d07458fe2aac9fd7b1ebf5fbed0c85d699caa97b6be02949dcc8123b737219dc6f3ece0669a293a4e0e4ae70d9a36fcba542195

"When we set aside our differences -- and it’s amazing sometimes how little our differences are -- we put our country and the citizens of our country first.”
- President Donald J. Trump

-------------

Working Together for the American People

President Trump held several meetings this week to confer with both Democratic and Republican members of Congress on the Administration’s tax reform goals. Yesterday, the President welcomed a bipartisan group of Representatives to the Cabinet Room of the White House to continue talks on tax reform. The Representatives supported the President's efforts to stimulate bipartisan discussion on the matter.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f5824a657d07458f6b8bf1b12ae9aca5bf5088c3932506cbe158fb994e9c27d749286cd338f05a19a6a64ac3d1715b5d526ee484c301932c
Watch the President's Remarks

A Unified Nation

Yesterday morning, President Trump met with Senator Tim Scott (R-SC) in the Oval Office to discuss race relations in America and strategies to promote a more unified country. President Trump and Senator Scott intend to engage in ongoing conversations regarding the Administration’s relationship with the African American community.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f5824a657d07458f1b17f4ca8fb691524d23b472bba6157842916f2b114177759cdbb9e81f1a1d8e97cf66a52e74884743a55c7ac16aeb13
Read more

Hurricane Irma Relief Updates

Today, President Donald Trump, First Lady Melania Trump, Vice President Mike Pence, and Mrs. Karen Pence will travel to Florida as part of Hurricane Irma’s recovery and relief efforts. They will receive a briefing with local leadership and relief organizations and visit with individuals impacted by the hurricane.

Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) and Florida State Emergency Response Team (SERT) say that those affected can register themselves as “Safe and Well” or search for loved ones at the link below:

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f5824a657d07458fd470b7cdb099af5d4ee2f126a4ab53f2da75ff5c53e750e3c0899d436e8e1b481ac40daa8b72e581edf731b9e9f3061b
American Red Cross' Safe and Well

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump Meets With Senator Tim Scott at the White House | September 13, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, the President and Vice President, along with the First and Second Ladies, will travel to Florida as part of Hurricane Irma’s recovery and relief efforts.

COMING UP

Tomorrow, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump will head to Joint Base Andrews in Maryland to meet with members of the military and give remarks. President Trump and Vice President Pence will attend the United Nations General Assembly in New York next week.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f5824a657d07458f0894a578bdc346cc6d9524d607eafbdaadabe4fd0150596d90e9b779454efd728e0b268e0bc6fce80b46a72010fb9ba6
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f5824a657d07458fec299702a39a06e7c9015c57d3d2b122474ca551a36683ae7c4fad10aaadaec306a3d7a1d37ad6b201b4f1196e583ecd
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4526d365b04be044368ac02c60aa75bbca26fc0c1779c697ef42248c21c3315cbc02956c278fbfacefe2c32b252056810
Unsubscribe

name: Tom Perez
subject: We'll fly you out to meet President Obama
body:
Enter for the chance to meet Barack Obama later this month.
---
**You and a friend could meet President Obama in Washington, D.C. Pitch in $3 or more and you'll be automatically entered for the chance to win!
**[ENTER TODAY](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052352b/4067b0a/3fc85b915/7e61dc15/850973858/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-President-Obama-Contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ENTER+TODAY&utm_campaign=em_20170914_tp_nd2&source=em_20170914_tp_nd2&refcode=em_20170914_tp_nd2")**
**
Derek --

Because you're one of our party's most committed supporters, I wanted to let you in on something big:

President Obama is joining us for an event in Washington, D.C. at the end of the month -- and you and a friend could meet him there (and get a photo, too)! [**All you have to do is chip in $3 or whatever you can to help elect Democrats, and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win.**](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052352b/4067b0a/3fc85b915/7e61dc12/850973858/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-President-Obama-Contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+All+you+have+to+do+is+chip+in+3+or+whate&utm_campaign=em_20170914_tp_nd2&source=em_20170914_tp_nd2&refcode=em_20170914_tp_nd2")

We'll handle all the details for our lucky winner. We'll fly you and a guest of your choice to the nation's capital and put you up overnight in a great hotel. All you'll have to do is think about what you want to talk about when you meet President Obama.

Don't miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, Derek. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can today to be automatically entered for the chance to join President Obama in D.C.

| Friend, This past weekend, Hurricane Irma hit the state of Florida as a Category 4 hurricane. Too many families to count have been displaced and some have lost literally everything. Relief efforts are expected to continue in the months ahead as we piece our communities back together. **In this moment of catastrophe, we must come together in unity and solidarity with those affected by Hurricane Irma.** [_**Please, if you are able, consider donating to local non-profits working to help those impacted by Irma.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e38/622b7b5b/5d63e5b/307bd8d7/3032984767/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hurricaneirma") I am incredibly thankful for the hard work and bravery of first responders and volunteers helping those in harm's way. As we continue to monitor the situation, please keep all of those that have been impacted in your thoughts. Thank you so much, Debbie |

name: Darcy, NH GOP Office Dog
subject: Support our iGOP Internship Program!
body:
**Derek,**

**We have just concluded our first iGOP Summer internship, and it was a great opportunity for High School and College Republicans to engage with the State GOP and give us a helping hand. **
**The interns supported the party through organizing data, volunteering for our special election candidates, and representing the party on field trips to the State House, WMUR, and more important places throughout our state. **

name: Barbara Mikulski
subject: You were there for me. Now 10 Democratic Senate women need you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
It's time to put on our lipstick, square up our shoulders, suit up, and fight. Ten of our Democratic Senate women are up for re-election next year -- and they need our support.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20170914-Mikulski-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team --

It's time to put on our lipstick, square up our shoulders, suit up, and fight.

Ten of our Democratic Senate women are up for re-election next year -- that's nearly HALF the women of the Senate -- and they're counting on our support to win re-election and keep fighting the tough battles to stop Donald Trump's disastrous agenda.

[**Join me in standing up for our Democratic Senate women. Chip in $1 to the 2018 DSCC Women 's Senate Network to give our Senate women the resources they need to win.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20170914-Mikulski-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

As our country's longest-serving female Senator, I had to win a lot of re-election fights -- and the DSCC was with me every time. And now, today's Senate women are counting on us too.

When I first ran for Senate, it looked like an uphill battle. No woman had ever been elected to the Senate in her own right. Politics was for old guys in smoke-filled rooms who kept saying I didn't "look the part."

While we have more women in the Senate now, the nasty attacks haven't let up. And our Democratic women need our support now as much as ever before.

We elected a record-breaking number of women to the Senate in 2012. But women are not a fad, fancy or a year. Now that those women are up for re-election, it's up to us to send them back to the Senate to prove our women leaders are here to stay.

**Chip in $1 now to the 2018 DSCC Women 's Senate Network to help our Democratic Senate women fight and win the tough campaigns ahead:

[http://www.dscc.org/help-women-win ](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20170914-Mikulski-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thank you,

Barbara Mikulski
Former U.S. Senator

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d897/2b07114c/1ea580e9/73148d1d/64420288/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d897/2b07114c/1ea580e9/73148d1c/64420288/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d897/2b07114c/1ea580e9/73148d1f/64420288/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Politics was for old guys in smoke-filled rooms who kept saying I didn't "look the part." While we have more women in the Senate now, the nasty attacks haven't let up. And our Democratic women need our support now as much as ever before. We elected a record-breaking number of women to the Senate in 2012. But women are not a fad, fancy or a year. Now that those women are up for re-election, it's up to us to send them back to the Senate to prove our women leaders are here to stay. Chip in $1 now to the 2018 DSCC Women 's Senate Network to help our Democratic Senate women fight and win the tough campaigns ahead: "" Thank you, Barbara Mikulski Former U.S. Senator Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee 120 Maryland Ave. NE Washington, DC 20002 Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Peter Hanscom
subject: Talk is cheap, action isn't.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---

| | Peter,

You wouldn't expect to be paid for a job you didn't do. That's just not in line with the values that you, me, or millions of hard-working Hoosiers share.

And whether as a private citizen working every day in Mishawaka, or as a U.S. Senator, Joe has always believed that if you don't put in the work, you shouldn't get paid -- and he wants to make sure every single one of his colleagues in the Senate believes it too.

That's why Joe has consistently supported the "No Budget, No Pay" principle in Congress. No matter how gridlocked Washington is, Hoosiers are depending on Congress' ability to pass a budget and keep the government running.

Our veterans need quality care, our elderly and disabled rely on the delivery of their Social Security benefits, and our beautiful national parks must stay open. And if Congress can't do its job, then lawmakers shouldn't get paid. That's just common sense.

**[Add your name today if you agree with Joe: You don't get paid if you don't do your job, and neither should Congress >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2462/7377f838/37ff4038/51fbf703/2360909084/VEsH/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-tell-congress-to-pass-no-budget-no-pay")**

Peter, make no mistake -- while it's easy to say you support this principle, **Joe 's the only candidate in this race who has put his money where his mouth is**. When far-right extremists shut down the government in 2013 because they didn't get what they wanted -- costing our economy tens of billions of dollars -- Joe refused to play along. Not only did he fight to reopen the government, but he donated every penny of his paycheck to food banks in Indiana. He did so because if Congress doesn't work, then its members shouldn't get paid.

So when politicians talk a big game on this issue, don't forget to see what Indiana's lawmakers actually did in 2013. Congress may have averted a shutdown this month, but **the threat of a shutdown in December is larger than it 's ever been before**. We need to hold our lawmakers accountable and send them a message today: do your job, or don't get paid.

**[Talk is cheap, but action isn't. Sign here to say Congress needs to stand with hard-working Hoosiers and pass No Budget, No Pay TODAY >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2462/7377f838/37ff4038/51fbf703/2360909084/VEsE/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-tell-congress-to-pass-no-budget-no-pay")**

If you're going to get paid tomorrow, I know you're going to work for it. Join Joe and help him make sure Congress does the same.

Best,

Peter Hanscom
Donnelly for Indiana

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: here we go again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __ Yesterday Senate Republicans started their last mad dash to repeal the Affordable Care Act. That's right: it's clear that the American people want us to work together to improve health care in America, but Senate Republicans remain obsessed with their desire to repeal Obamacare.

The Graham-Cassidy bill is more of the same. It would eliminate the tax credits and protections that are needed to provide critical care for millions of Americans and replace them with block grants to the states that would fall far short of what is necessary to ensure access to affordable health care.

Right now, Republicans are in a race against the clock. The Senate Parliamentarian has ruled that -- under the rules of the Senate -- they only have until September 30th to pass a bill with 51 votes (fifty Senators plus Vice President Pence). After that Republicans could only destroy Obamacare if they can get 60 votes in the Senate -- and they know that the 48 Democratic Senators can block that. That's why they are scurrying to find a way to pass something before September 30.

[**The window is closing and Republicans are determined to make good on their pledge to repeal Obamacare. We can 't afford to sit idly by and watch. Sign here now and stand with me against this latest Republican push to take health care away from millions of our fellow Americans >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bd2/70cdc2ba/469a2832/397ddf5/555111481/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-help-us-defeat-republican-health-care-plans?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+The+window+is+closing+and+Republicans+ar&utm_campaign=em091417&source=em091417")

Lindsay Graham has been rallying the Republican troops to his cause, saying, ""If you believe repealing and replacing Obamacare is a good idea, this is your best and only chance to make it happen."

After all our successful efforts over the last past eight months to stop Trump and the Senate Republicans from destroying the Affordable Care Act, it would be a tragedy to lose it all to a last-ditch Republican effort in the next two weeks.

[**Please join me in standing up to this last minute Republican effort to get the votes to repeal the Affordable Care Act >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bd2/70cdc2ba/469a2832/397ddf2/555111481/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-help-us-defeat-republican-health-care-plans?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+join+me+in+standing+up+to+this+la&utm_campaign=em091417&source=em091417")

Thank you for all you do,

Chris Van Hollen

**New Hampshire GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on our Federal Delegation's Plans for Health Care**
**For Immediate Release:** September 14, 2017**Contact:** Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310 Concord – New Hampshire GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding New Hampshire's Federal Delegation's plans for health care reform: “Yesterday Senator Jeanne Shaheen signed onto Bernie Sanders' socialist takeover of our already-failing healthcare system, while Senator Hassan broke ranks and refused to endorse the Sanders/Shaheen socialist plan. Reps. Carol Shea-Porter and Annie Kuster need to come clean on whether they will continue their slavish support for ObamaCare or abandon it for Shaheen’s socialized medicine. Do they support a full government takeover of healthcare? Will they co-sponsor similar legislation in the U.S. House? After obstructing Republican efforts to improve America’s healthcare, Shea-Porter and Kuster owe us answers.”

###

subject: Dirty tricks
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6036/24c69fd9/9e953b16/189a95a3/3976923414/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE925N_digital_email_20170914_NevadaRecall2_inact&source=WQEFE925N_digital_email_20170914_NevadaRecall2_inact")
---

Peter,

Last year, we helped turn the Nevada Legislature blue.

Since then, Democrats have passed a wave of legislation to help women and families. Insurance coverage of birth control and mammograms is now mandatory, and they established a new $500,000 family-planning program.

Republicans are furious with all the progress in Nevada -- so they're trying to _recall_ women senators, including two EMILY's List women, and turn the state Senate red.

**[We HAVE to show Republicans they can't subvert democracy to stand in the way of progressive policies. Donate $3 to help fight the Nevada recall effort and support our state and local women nationwide.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6036/24c69fd9/9e953b16/189a95dc/3976923414/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170914_email_NevadaRecall2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+We+HAVE+to+show+Republicans+they+cant+su&utm_campaign=WQEFE925N_digital_email_20170914_NevadaRecall2_inact&source=WQEFE925N_digital_email_20170914_NevadaRecall2_inact")**

The two EMILY's List women the state GOP is trying to recall, Joyce Woodhouse and Nicole Cannizzaro, are part of a powerful group of pro-choice Democratic women that's passing all this legislation with women specifically in mind.

With their help, Nevada just capped one of the most progressive, feminist legislative sessions of anywhere in the country -- because that's what women do.

Nicole introduced a new law to protect pregnant workers from discrimination on the job. And Nevadans can now pick up 12 months of birth control at a time -- a huge help to the many women who struggle to consistently access contraception.

**We can't let Republicans roll back all this phenomenal progress with their dirty tricks. Donate $3 to help fight the recall effort and support state and local women:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Nevada-Recall-Fight](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6036/24c69fd9/9e953b16/189a95dd/3976923414/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170914_email_NevadaRecall2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgNevadaRecallFigh&utm_campaign=WQEFE925N_digital_email_20170914_NevadaRecall2_inact&source=WQEFE925N_digital_email_20170914_NevadaRecall2_inact")**

Thanks,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List
